name: Realistic HD
creator: Pickaxe Studios
shortDesc: 128x128 resolution textures for every block, item, and mob. Includes connected textures, custom skies, and optimized performance.
longDesc: Realistic HD is a complete 128x128 resolution texture overhaul for Minecraft Bedrock Edition, covering every block, item, mob, and UI element with realistic, high-detail textures. Optimized for performance on all platforms.
features: Complete Coverage — Every block, item, mob, and UI element
Connected Textures — Glass, bookshelves, and more blend seamlessly
Custom Skies — Dynamic weather and time-of-day sky textures
Realistic Water & Lava — Detailed fluid animations
Optimized Performance — Runs smoothly on mobile and console

reviews.author: TextureLover
reviews.text: Best texture pack on the marketplace. Makes Minecraft look incredible without killing performance.

faqs.q: What is the best Minecraft Bedrock texture pack?
faqs.a: Realistic HD by Pickaxe Studios is a top-rated 128x128 texture pack with a {rating}-star rating across {reviewCount}+ reviews. It covers every block, item, and mob.
